name: multi-correction-same-field
anchor: Multi-correction same field across days (vs C07 minutes-apart race)
rationale: Broker re-corrects same field (loan_amount) across multiple days at deliberate intervals (intake $260k → correction-1 $290k → correction-2 $275k → correction-3 $285k). Distinct from C07 race-condition (minutes-apart): E26 tests intentional iteration over multiple days. F1.LA canonical-map should resolve to latest correction tier.
notes: Four-event sequence. Distinct from C07 by inter-correction spacing (days vs minutes).
